Looking at the pattern from before:
1. Click purple ring center (16, 57) - opened path
2. Click orange object M center (16, 49) - moved it
3. Click white pixels to complete gray diamonds
4. Click purple square M center to move it
But now I'm stuck. The purple square is at (33, 44) and clicking it again had no impact. Let me look at what other objects are on the board that I haven't interacted with.
Looking at the segmentation:
- Gray diamond id=5 at (10-14, 49-53) - 12 pixels
- Gray diamond id=16 at (18-22, 45-49) - 12 pixels
- Orange object id=7 at (14-18, 47-51) with M at (16, 49)
- Purple square id=28 at (31-35, 42-46) with M at (33, 44)
- Purple ring at (15-21, 54-60)
- Orange diamond at bottom (48-54, 37-43)
I haven't clicked the orange object M center at (16, 49) yet in this new position. Let me try clicking it.
